_meta.description: Golden fixtures for tsecon-funcshock (functional shocks, Inoue-Rossi 2021).

references.functional_pca: numpy.linalg.eigh of cov = Xc'Xc/T; sign: largest-|.| entry positive (first index on ties)
references.flp: statsmodels OLS(y_{t+h} ~ const + all K scores + p lags of y).fit(cov_type="HAC", maxlags=h+p, use_correction=True)
references.scenario: numpy: w = phi' delta, response = w'beta_h, var = w' Cov_h w
references.fvar: statsmodels VAR([scores, y]).fit(lags, trend="c"); Theta_h[:, :K] @ solve(P[:K,:K], w), P = cholesky(sigma_u)
